inputs.label: First Term (a)
inputs.businessContext: The initial value of the arithmetic progression.

inputs.label: Common Difference (d)
inputs.businessContext: The constant increment between consecutive terms.

inputs.label: Number of Terms (n)
inputs.businessContext: The total count of terms in the sequence.

inputs.label: Term Position (k)
inputs.businessContext: The position of the term to find (1-indexed).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the results.

formulas.nthTerm: Math.round((firstTerm + (numberOfTerms - 1) * commonDifference) * Math.pow(10, decimals)) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
formulas.sumOfTerms: Math.round(((numberOfTerms / 2) * (2 * firstTerm + (numberOfTerms - 1) * commonDifference)) * Math.pow(10, decimals)) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
formulas.kthTerm: Math.round((firstTerm + (termPosition - 1) * commonDifference) * Math.pow(10, decimals)) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
